title: Forge Goes Fast
description: A forge modpack that optimize your game!
body:
# ⚡ Forge Goes Fast
This is a Forge-based modpack designed to improve Minecraft’s performance. It reduces RAM usage, increases FPS, and includes several quality-of-life improvements. It also supports a selection of Fabric mods, thanks to the Sinytra Connector.

## 📦 Features
- Improved performance and reduced system resource usage
- Full parity with Vanilla
- (Limited) Fabric mod compatibility via [Connector]([https://modrinth.com/mod/connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector))
- Stable and minimal setup, suitable as a base for your own modpack
- Tested on Windows and Linux. Should work on MacOS (fingers crossed, I don't have a mac)

## 📦 Non-Features
- Non-performance tweaks. This pack will only include performance mods

## ⚠️ Don’t get banned lol  
All included mods are client-side, but some servers may have restrictions or anti-cheat systems that conflict with certain features. Be sure to review server rules before connecting.

## 🍥 Shoutout to the Sponsor  
[![sponsor](https://i.ibb.co/hDPMgQr/warofzen.webp)](https://www.kinetichosting.net/)  
Need a server? These guys sell them. I don’t know what else to tell you.
 
## ✌️ Credits  
- [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo) – stole some ideas from them. They’re awesome.
